retrieval_by_decomposition.decomposed_query: Which trials are 'Original Publication' in the 'Originial publication or Follow-up' column?

candidate.question: Which trials have Originial publication or Follow-up = 'Original publication'?
candidate.sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Trial phase", "Cancer type" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Originial publication or Follow-up" = 'Original publication';
candidate.parent_question: Find Durvalumab trials for Urothelial cancer that are original publications in Phase 2?

candidate.question: Trials with Originial publication or Follow-up Original publication
candidate.sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Trial phase", "Cancer type" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Originial publication or Follow-up" = 'Original publication';
candidate.parent_question: Find trials of Cemiplimab for pancreatic cancer that are in Phase 2 and were first published as original research?

candidate.question: What trials have Originial publication or Follow-up equal to 'Follow-up'?
candidate.sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Trial phase", "Cancer type" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Originial publication or Follow-up" = 'Follow-up';
candidate.parent_question: Find Phase 3 Ipilimumab trials in Melanoma that were follow-up publications?

retrieval_by_decomposition.decomposed_query: Which trials have 'Cancer type' = 'Head and Neck'?

candidate.question: What trials have Cancer type = 'Head and Neck' ?
candidate.sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Head and Neck';
candidate.parent_question: Which trials for Head and Neck cancer used chemo or anti-EGFR therapy as the control arm?

candidate.question: Which trials have Cancer type = 'Head and Neck cancer'?
candidate.sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Trial name", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Head and Neck cancer';
candidate.parent_question: Which trials studied Avelumab for Head and Neck cancer?

candidate.question: Trials with Cancer type Head and Neck
candidate.sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Trial name", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Head and Neck';
candidate.parent_question: Which trials studied Pembrolizumab for Head and Neck cancer?

retrieval_by_decomposition.decomposed_query: Which trials have 'Cancer type' = 'Non-small cell lung cancer'?

candidate.question: What trials have Cancer type equal to 'Non-Small Cell Lung'?
candidate.sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Non-Small Cell Lung';
candidate.parent_question: Find Non-Small Cell Lung trials using CTLA-4 where PD‑L1 positivity was not an inclusion criterion?

candidate.question: What trials have Cancer type equal to 'Small Cell Lung'?$
candidate.sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Name of ICI", "Trial phase", "Cancer type", "Trial name", "Treatment regimen" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Small Cell Lung';
candidate.parent_question: Which trials for Small Cell Lung cancer were in phase 3?

candidate.question: List trials with Cancer type = 'Small Cell Lung'.
candidate.sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Number of arms", "Control arm", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Small Cell Lung';
candidate.parent_question: Which Small Cell Lung trials had 3 or more arms and used chemotherapy as a control?
